name: Live3D - Comic & Animation & VTuber Maker - Virtual Production
short_description: Live3D is a program enabling anyone with a webcam to digitally embody awesome characters. It is meant to be an open creation platform so everybody can make their own characters, backgrounds or props and import them into Live3D.
detailed_description:
Before using the software, please read the following:

1.Live3D is a program enabling anyone with a webcam to digitally embody awesome characters. It is meant to be an open creation platform so everybody can make their own characters, backgrounds or props and import them into Live3D.

2.Live3D has been released or downloaded on several platforms, including Steam. You can go to the official website for Live3D to gain account opening and package purchase.

3.Account opening and package details

(1) The free version for new users (0$/3 days)

Includes functions: basic functions, short video, poster/cartoon,custom model

Permissions: With watermark, only for new users, can't be used commercially

(2) The basic edition (5$/ month)

Includes functions: basic functions, software capture support, custom resources importing, live broadcast, short video, posters/cartoons, custom model

Permissions: individual user or studio use, with watermark

(3) The enterprise edition (Customize the plan according to the needs of the enterprise and then negotiate the price)

Included functions: it not only contains basic functions (such as live broadcast, short video, poster/cartoon, custom resources importing, custom model) but also supports motion capture and enterprise customization services.


As for "commercial use", it means that corporate users use Live3D to produce advertising or IP content and publish it publicly

4. How to get the Live3D enterprise edition?

If you are interested in the enterprise edition, want to know more about the Live3D enterprise edition.

Please find us in the following ways

(1) Contact us by email hello@zingfront.com
(2) Add QQ group '414669952' then message group manager
